text: Walking through this dimly-lit hallway, I feel a sense of alienation and quiet tension. The cold fluorescent lights and the emptiness press on my mind, as if the building is holding its breath. There is both an invitation to contemplation and a subtle unease about being so alone among artificial order. The presence of the "R+D" signage suggests creativity and innovation, but it feels distant in the shadows, like a promise waiting for light to return. My own presence here heightens my acute awareness of space and silence.
